author: jtraglia
content: Deposit testing with higher gas limits

author: draganrakita
content: List of found bugs that were confirmed with steel team. Clients that currently pass latest fixture will need to fix them:

author: draganrakita
content: 1. Tx create on halt/revert refund is not done (multiple tests)

author: draganrakita
content: 2. block.state_gas_used does not include eip7702 state refund. It is higher than expected. (Around 8 tests)

author: draganrakita
content: 3. State refund propagated by mistake if store 0 -> x, sstore x -> 0, revert is done in one frame. (Around 5 tests)

author: draganrakita
content:
4. Tx create collision test (Not possible to happen on chain) regular gas was not consumed (1 test)
